templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/fit-guide?al_pg_id=30c6a78b-f60b-4281-9476-947cf352983c

templates.name: What should I do if my package says delivered but I don't have it?
templates.content: We are sorry to hear about the delay with your order's delivery! Sometimes USPS can be a bit premature with updating the delivery status for a package to "delivered" up to a day or two before the package actually gets delivered. There is a strong chance your package will be delivered within the next few days. If, however, you do not receive your order within 5 business days after the date your package is marked as delivered, please let us know so we can proceed with filing a claim to either get you a refund or a new package out to you. Please keep us updated with the status of your order's delivery. If you have any questions, please let us know. We are always happy to help!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (888) 758-1070 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We ship from Costa Mesa, California.

templates.name: Can reward points be used with bundles and/or other promo codes?
templates.content: Unfortunately, you can't use reward points on bundles, or with any other promotional codes.

templates.name: Measurements for Clutch
templates.content: Sure! Check out the measurements here: https://bombereyewear.attn.tv/sl/QwvrhmbJ

templates.name: Which style should I get? Difference between styles?
templates.content: I'd recommend checking out our style guide to compare all our shades here - https://www.bombereyewear.com/blogs/news/new-to-bomber-heres-a-quick-guide-to-your-new-favorite-glasses

templates.name: Are the potochromic glasses anti-fog?
templates.content: At the moment, our photochromic glasses don't come with an anti-fog option, though we do have anti-fog alternatives in our collection which you can check out here: bombereyewear.com/collections/anti-fog

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here -  https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/faq

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our ambassador program here: https://bombereyewear.attn.tv/sl/PxQThlgQ

templates.name: Do you offer prescription?
templates.content: We have had many of our customers take our frames to their own optometrists and had them fitted with their prescription, but depending on your prescription and the frame you choose, they may no longer pass safety standards if you're going for one of our safety models. We do offer prescription on a selected number of styles available only online and not in-store. You can check them out here: https://bombereyewear.attn.tv/sl/a15fPrMi

templates.name: Are they scratch-resistant?
templates.content: Yes, all of our lenses feature a scratch resistant film.

templates.name: Which of your lenses are a category 3?
templates.content: All smoke, tinted, brown, and mirrored lenses are in a number 3 light transmission category.

templates.name: Does my order come with stickers?
templates.content: All purchases will ship out with stickers in the order.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Order processing takes 1-3 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, FedEx, or DHL. Once shipped it will take 2-5 business days for domestic orders. As for international shipping, we can't provide an estimated time due to customs. In all honesty, there are packages that make it through customs within a few days while others take a few weeks and it's completely out of our control. Once it clears customs, it usually only takes 2-3 business days to arrive.

templates.name: Do you have a store I can try on?
templates.content: We have all of our safety glasses and sunglasses available for purchase in our showroom that's located at our headquarters at 1820 Monrovia Avenue, Costa Mesa CA 92627. We're open Monday - Thursday: 10am - 5pm and Friday: 10am - 3pm. You can also find our dealers here: https://bombereyewear.attn.tv/sl/Si43EtOc

templates.name: Do you offer glasses without the foam?
templates.content:
Most of our glasses have foam. The only ones that don't are:

- Strange: https://www.bombereyewear.com/collections/strange 
- X-Bomb: https://www.bombereyewear.com/collections/x-bomb-safety 
- E-Bomb: https://www.bombereyewear.com/collections/e-bomb-safety
- Z-Bomb: https://www.bombereyewear.com/collections/z-bomb

templates.name: Warranty Policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/faq?al_pg_id=a2fbc607-fed7-4faf-a5d3-9e9b4bafb2ee

templates.name: Dealer locator
templates.content: You can check out if there's a dealer near you here: https://bombereyewear.attn.tv/sl/pBkPxf-3

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free standard shipping on domestic orders over $80. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Retailer inquiries
templates.content: Please fill out the form at the following link: https://bombereyewear.attn.tv/sl/H2ZvM0Wg We'll get back to you after we have reviewed the info.

templates.name: Do you offer replacement lenses?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't offer replacement lenses at this time. Really sorry about that!

templates.name: Military discount / First responder/ Healthcare discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/civil-service-discount

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! You can check out our fit guide here: https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/fit-guide

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at contact@bombereyewear.com, live chat with one of our agents here: https://www.bombereyewear.com/ or give us a call at 888-758-1070. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at contact@bombereyewear.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do you work with charities? Corporate Social Responsibility Activities
templates.content: We do work with charities! Please email contact@bombereyewear.com with the information you would like to be considered.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/bombereyewear/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/bombereyewearusa/

templates.name: Where do I initiate my return / exchange?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://bomber.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Once your items are inspected by us, you'll get your refund typically within 48 hours.

templates.name: What is your biggest and widest style?
templates.content: Our biggest and widest fitting style is the AHI Bomb and the second biggest and widest style is the MEGA Bomb. But our BUZZ Bomb has a very oversize fit as well.

templates.name: Can your glasses fit over prescription glasses?
templates.content: We currently only offer one OTG (over-the-glasses) style that will fit over your prescription glasses called the Magnum because of its oversized fit. You can check it out here: https://www.bombereyewear.com/collections/magnum?al_pg_id=a2fbc607-fed7-4faf-a5d3-9e9b4bafb2ee

templates.name: Do all of your glasses float?
templates.content: Most of them do! These are the ones that don't float: Strange, Z Bomb, E Bomb, X Bomb, and H Bomb.

templates.name: Do points expire?
templates.content: Rewards dollars act the same as gift card balances, and they never expire. Just apply them to your cart before checkout, and you'll save a chunk of change on your purchase!

templates.name: How do I redeem my points?
templates.content: When you've got your favorite sunnies in your cart, look to the right side of your screen. You'll see a drop-down menu with options to cash in points at 100, 200, 250, and 300. Simply select your point balance and cash in for discounts!

templates.name: How many points can I apply at one time?
templates.content: 300 points is the maximum number of points you can apply at one time per transaction.

templates.name: Do your safety glasses have safety markings?
templates.content: All of our safety glasses have safety markings on the frames and lenses. ANSI Z87+ is stamped on the frame and there are special purpose safety markings on the lens. Here is a blog that goes into detail about our safety markings if you are interested: https://www.bombereyewear.com/blogs/news/safety-marking-requirements?_pos=1&_sid=6318d4df1&_ss=r&al_pg_id=a2fbc607-fed7-4faf-a5d3-9e9b4bafb2ee

templates.name: Are your safety glasses ANSI Z87+ rated?
templates.content: Yes!  All of our products in our safety line of shades meet and exceed the ANSI Z87+ safety standard.

templates.name: Are all of your glasses safety rated?
templates.content: Most of them, but not all.  Just the ones that have the word "safety" in the name of the product. Here are all of the styles we offer in our safety line: https://www.bombereyewear.com/pages/all-safety

templates.name: Custom glasses
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not offer custom glasses at this time.
